title: cordia myxa var. ixiocarpa
intro: Cordia myxa var. ixiocarpa, commonly known as the Bead Tree or Cordia, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia, characterized by its vibrant green leaves and small, fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Cordia myxa var. ixiocarpa lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, treat fever, and alleviate digestive issues, which are attributed to its alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, Cordia myxa var. ixiocarpa is prepared as an herbal decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
